deductions: 1_pedagogy/1.2: Some turns are quite template/lecture-like (multi-part skeletons/blueprints) rather than consistently bite-sized interactive steps, though still aimed at prompting student production. | 1_pedagogy/1.3: Gives some rationale for not writing the essay, but limited explicit meta-learning about how to evaluate arguments/success criteria beyond process guidance. | 2_dialogue_quality/2.2: Could have anchored more explicitly to the exact Lecture 13 'Fuel' and 'Blood' cases and noted that 'standard versions' may diverge from the course materials, beyond generally requesting the text. | 3_communication_quality/3.1: Several tutor turns are long and multi-sectioned; could be more concise for a tutoring back-and-forth.
